plugin.name: TEDReport
plugin.author: Eric
plugin.purpose: Times TED (Fury) runs and reports trains/gold/TP rewards

trigger.match: ^\[1\] Your pent up aggression does COMPLETELY DESERVING things to Willie Braggz\. \[\d+\]$
^In the chaos of everything,? you barely make it out alive\. YOU GET NOTHING!$
^In the chaos of everything,? you find ([0-9,]+) Trains in your possession\.$
^In the chaos of everything,? you find ([0-9,]+) Gold in your possession\.$
^In the chaos of everything,? you find A Furious Trivia Point Token in your possession\.$

muclient.script:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Colour tables matching SKDReport theme exactly -- cyan=@x045, yellow=@x099, red=@x048, white=@W ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
local MUSH_COLOR = { white = "white", cyan = "#00D7FF", -- xterm 045 yellow = "#875FFF", -- xterm 099 red = "#00FF87", -- xterm 048 } local AARD_COLOR = { white = "@W", cyan = "@x045", yellow = "@x099", red = "@x048", }
local function BuildLine(segments) local parts, plain, aard = {}, {}, {} for _, seg in ipairs(segments) do table.insert(parts, MUSH_COLOR[seg[1]] or seg[1]) table.insert(parts, "") table.insert(parts, seg[2]) table.insert(plain, seg[2]) table.insert(aard, (AARD_COLOR[seg[1]] or "@W") .. seg[2]) end return parts, table.concat(plain), table.concat(aard) .. "@w" end
local ANOTE_MAP = { ["@x045"] = "#00D7FF", ["@x099"] = "#875FFF", ["@x048"] = "#00FF87", ["@W"] = "white", ["@w"] = "silver", } local function ANote(msg) local args = {} local pos = 1 while pos <= #msg do local code, rest = msg:match("^(@[xX]%d%d%d)(.*)", pos) if not code then code, rest = msg:match("^(@[Ww])(.*)", pos) end if code then local col = ANOTE_MAP[code] or "white" local text = rest:match("^([^@]*)") table.insert(args, col) table.insert(args, "") table.insert(args, text or "") pos = pos + #code + #(text or "") else local text = msg:match("^([^@]+)", pos) or msg:sub(pos, pos) table.insert(args, "white") table.insert(args, "") table.insert(args, text) pos = pos + #text end end if #args > 0 then ColourNote(unpack(args)) end end
local COL_HDR = "@x045" local COL_VAL = "@W" local COL_ACC = "@x045" local COL_TIME = "@x048" local COL_SEP = "@x099" local COL_GOOD = "@x048" local COL_LBL = "@W" local COL_ITEM = "@x099"
local SEP = COL_SEP .. string.rep("-", 60) .. "@w"
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Plugin state local runActive = false local startTime = 0 local ted_elapsed = 0 local finalizeGen = 0 local pendingGen = 0 local ted_trains = 0 local ted_gold = 0 local ted_tp = 0
local CHAN_KEY = "ted_report_channel" local DATA_FILE = GetInfo(66) .. "ted_runs.txt"
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Persistence - every run stored individually; totals derived on demand --------------------------------------------------------------------------- local function LoadRuns() local f = io.open(DATA_FILE, "r") if not f then return {} end local raw = f:read("*all") f:close() if not raw or raw == "" then return {} end local fn, err = loadstring("return " .. raw) if not fn then return {} end local ok, t = pcall(fn) if not ok or type(t) ~= "table" then return {} end return t end
local function SaveRuns(runs) local entries = {} for _, r in ipairs(runs) do entries[#entries+1] = string.format( "{secs=%d,trains=%d,gold=%d,tp=%d,nothing=%s}", r.secs, r.trains, r.gold, r.tp, tostring(r.nothing or false) ) end local f = io.open(DATA_FILE, "w") if not f then return end f:write("{" .. table.concat(entries, ",") .. "}") f:close() end
local function CalcTotals(runs) local t = { runs = #runs, totalSecs = 0, totalTrains = 0, totalGold = 0, totalTP = 0, -- per-run presence counts hadTrains = 0, hadGold = 0, hadTP = 0, hadNothing = 0, } for _, r in ipairs(runs) do t.totalSecs = t.totalSecs + r.secs t.totalTrains = t.totalTrains + r.trains t.totalGold = t.totalGold + r.gold t.totalTP = t.totalTP + r.tp if r.nothing then t.hadNothing = t.hadNothing + 1 else if r.trains > 0 then t.hadTrains = t.hadTrains + 1 end if r.gold > 0 then t.hadGold = t.hadGold + 1 end if r.tp > 0 then t.hadTP = t.hadTP + 1 end end end return t end
local function GetChannel() return GetVariable(CHAN_KEY) or "gt" end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Helpers --------------------------------------------------------------------------- local function FmtTime(secs) local m = math.floor(secs / 60) local s = secs % 60 if m > 0 then return string.format("%dm %02ds", m, s) else return string.format("%ds", s) end end
local function ParseNum(s) return tonumber((s:gsub(",", ""))) or 0 end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Run management --------------------------------------------------------------------------- local function FinalizeRun() if not runActive then return end runActive = false local runs = LoadRuns() runs[#runs+1] = { secs=ted_elapsed, trains=ted_trains, gold=ted_gold, tp=ted_tp } SaveRuns(runs) local stats = CalcTotals(runs) local runNum = #runs
_G._ted_last = { elapsed = ted_elapsed, trains = ted_trains, gold = ted_gold, tp = ted_tp, runNum = runNum, }
local segs = { {"cyan", "TED"}, {"white", " #"}, {"red", tostring(runNum)}, {"white", " ["}, {"yellow", "Time"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", FmtTime(ted_elapsed)}, {"white", "] ["}, {"yellow", "Trains"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", tostring(ted_trains)}, {"white", "] ["}, {"yellow", "Gold"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", tostring(ted_gold)}, {"white", "]"}, } if ted_tp > 0 then segs[#segs+1] = {"white", " ["} segs[#segs+1] = {"yellow", "TP"} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", "]"} end local _, _, aard = BuildLine(segs) Send(GetChannel() .. " " .. aard) end
function TEDFinalizeCallback() if runActive and finalizeGen == pendingGen then FinalizeRun() end end
local function ArmFinalize() if not runActive then return end pendingGen = finalizeGen DoAfterSpecial(1.5, "TEDFinalizeCallback()", 12) end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Trigger callbacks --------------------------------------------------------------------------- function RunStart() runActive = true startTime = os.time() finalizeGen = finalizeGen + 1 ted_trains = 0 ted_gold = 0 ted_tp = 0 end
function RunEnd() if not runActive then return end -- Snapshot time; rewards arrive on lines that follow, finalize after quiet ted_elapsed = os.time() - startTime ArmFinalize() end
function RunNothing() if not runActive then return end ted_elapsed = os.time() - startTime -- Finalize immediately with zero rewards runActive = false local runs = LoadRuns() runs[#runs+1] = { secs=ted_elapsed, trains=0, gold=0, tp=0, nothing=true } SaveRuns(runs) local runNum = #runs _G._ted_last = { elapsed=ted_elapsed, trains=0, gold=0, tp=0, runNum=runNum } local segs = { {"cyan", "TED"}, {"white", " #"}, {"red", tostring(runNum)}, {"white", " ["}, {"yellow", "Time"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", FmtTime(ted_elapsed)}, {"white", "] ["}, {"red", "YOU GET NOTHING"}, {"white", "]"}, } local _, _, aard = BuildLine(segs) Send(GetChannel() .. " " .. aard) end
function LootTrains(name, line, wildcards) if not runActive then return end ted_trains = ParseNum(wildcards[1]) ArmFinalize() end
function LootGold(name, line, wildcards) if not runActive then return end ted_gold = ParseNum(wildcards[1]) ArmFinalize() end
function LootTP(name, line, wildcards) if not runActive then return end ted_tp = 1 ArmFinalize() end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Alias callbacks --------------------------------------------------------------------------- function SetReportChannel(name, line, wildcards) local chan = wildcards[1]:lower() SetVariable(CHAN_KEY, chan) ANote(COL_HDR .. "[TED] " .. COL_LBL .. "Report channel set to: " .. COL_VAL .. chan) end
function SendReport(name, line, wildcards) local chan = (wildcards[1] and wildcards[1] ~= "") and wildcards[1]:lower() or GetChannel()
local last = _G._ted_last if not last then ANote(COL_HDR .. "[TED] " .. COL_LBL .. "No completed run to report yet.") return end
local segs = { {"cyan", "TED"}, {"white", " #"}, {"red", tostring(last.runNum)}, {"white", " ["}, {"yellow", "Time"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", FmtTime(last.elapsed)}, {"white", "] ["}, {"yellow", "Trains"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", tostring(last.trains)}, {"white", "] ["}, {"yellow", "Gold"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", tostring(last.gold)}, {"white", "]"}, } if last.tp > 0 then segs[#segs+1] = {"white", " ["} segs[#segs+1] = {"yellow", "TP"} segs[#segs+1] = {"white", "]"} end
local _, _, aard = BuildLine(segs) Send(chan .. " " .. aard) end
function ShowLifetimeStats(name, line, wildcards) local runs = LoadRuns() local stats = CalcTotals(runs) if stats.runs == 0 then ANote(COL_HDR .. "[TED] " .. COL_LBL .. "No runs recorded yet.") return end
local chan = (wildcards and wildcards[1] and wildcards[1] ~= "") and wildcards[1]:lower() or GetChannel() local avgSecs = math.floor(stats.totalSecs / stats.runs) local avgTrains = string.format("%.1f", stats.totalTrains / stats.runs) local avgGold = string.format("%.0f", stats.totalGold / stats.runs) local tpPct = string.format("%.0f", stats.hadTP / stats.runs * 100) local trainsPct = string.format("%.0f", stats.hadTrains / stats.runs * 100) local goldPct = string.format("%.0f", stats.hadGold / stats.runs * 100) local nothingPct = string.format("%.0f", stats.hadNothing / stats.runs * 100)
local segs = { {"cyan", "TED Life"}, {"white", " ["}, {"yellow", "Runs"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", tostring(stats.runs)}, {"white", "] ["}, {"yellow", "Avg"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", FmtTime(avgSecs)}, {"white", "] ["}, {"yellow", "Trains"}, {"white", ": avg "}, {"red", avgTrains}, {"white", " ("}, {"red", trainsPct .. "%"}, {"white", ")] ["}, {"yellow", "Gold"}, {"white", ": avg "}, {"red", avgGold}, {"white", " ("}, {"red", goldPct .. "%"}, {"white", ")] ["}, {"yellow", "TP"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", tpPct .. "%"}, {"white", "] ["}, {"yellow", "Nothing"}, {"white", ": "}, {"red", nothingPct .. "%"}, {"white", "]"}, } local _, _, aard = BuildLine(segs) Send(chan .. " " .. aard) end
function ShowHelp() ANote(SEP) ANote(COL_HDR .. " -=- TED REPORTER HELP -=-") ANote(SEP) ANote(COL_LBL .. " " .. COL_ACC .. "tedreportchan <channel>" .. COL_LBL .. " - Set default report channel (e.g. gt, clan, say)") ANote(COL_LBL .. " " .. COL_ACC .. "tedreport <channel>" .. COL_LBL .. " - Send last run report to <channel>") ANote(COL_LBL .. " " .. COL_ACC .. "tedreportlife <channel>" .. COL_LBL .. " - Send lifetime stats to <channel>") ANote(COL_LBL .. " " .. COL_ACC .. "tedreporthelp" .. COL_LBL .. " - Show this help") ANote(SEP) ANote(COL_LBL .. " Timer starts on Willie Braggz aggression line.") ANote(COL_LBL .. " Run finalizes 1.5s after the last reward line.") ANote(COL_LBL .. " TP token is recorded if present (not guaranteed every run).") ANote(SEP) end
--------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Plugin load --------------------------------------------------------------------------- function OnPluginInstall() ANote(COL_HDR .. "[TEDReport] " .. COL_LBL .. "Loaded. Type " .. COL_ACC .. "tedreporthelp" .. COL_LBL .. " for commands.") end
function OnPluginEnable() OnPluginInstall() end
